name: Tier 3 insights block focus time creates calendar event
description: Logged-in user opens the Weekly Insights sidebar and clicks Block focus time to add a Focus Block event that appears on the weekly calendar

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar and Weekly Insights sidebar to load
Scroll to the Weekly Insights panel on the right side of the dashboard
Wait for 3 seconds for the Quick actions section to appear in the Weekly Insights panel
Click the Block focus time button in the Quick actions section of the Weekly Insights panel
Wait for 4 seconds for the calendar and insights panel to refresh
Verify the Weekly Insights panel shows a green success message about a focus block being added
Verify the weekly calendar shows a Focus Block event after applying the insight action
